Vuhl Car Models and Generations:

2019:
- Vuhl 05RR
  Power: 326 hp, 708 horsepower, 326 hp


2015:
- Vuhl 05
  Power: 326 hp, 708 horsepower, 326 hp
  Drivetrain: quattro

56f97bea79b20a7321ace767941"];var
